comment.body:
Market is still rangebounding. 
Listen,
European leaders fear being sidelined as the U.S. and Russia conduct their own private discussions on ceasefire terms and territorial concessions, effectively excluding Ukraine and key NATO allies from the most consequential talks.
Trump Will pull out senior U.S. envoys from the public peace talks, signaling a formal disengagement. 
Despite rhetorical gestures toward ceasefires, Russian forces have pressed on with offensive operations, capturing territory and sustaining civilian impacts, which underscores the continuing momentum of the war.
Moscow expects minimal pushback and little meaningful enforcement of any truce. 
Remember to Donald Trump’s prior threats to abandon peace efforts without immediate results… "impatience" - as I said.
European nations fear they will be left to shoulder the financial costs of reconstruction, security guarantees, and refugee resettlement without significant U.S. support.
So the conflict risks further escalation.
EU has chosen an intellectual cover for a militarized order sacrifizing diplomacy and universal values for a zero-sum paradigm, risking cycles of war and instability.

comment.body:
---

**SPX Game Plan – Wednesday, April 23**  
**(Tape Bomb, Color = Green)**

🧭 **Context**  
• Trump tone shift → SPX +2% premarket  
• Every $NDX stock closed green Tuesday  
• "Trump Put" forming? ~5100 soft floor  
• Elon: back to $TSLA in May  
• SPX 20DMA = 5405 → spot ~5395  
• Narrative flip: "How far up?"  
• China rebukes US “deal” talk  
• Politico: “Deals” = mostly PR  
• Popcorn tape 🍿

📅 **Macro / Earnings**  
• Reports: $CMG $NOW $IBM $LRCX $TXN $VKTX $NE  
• Data: 10a Home Sales, 10:30a EIA Crude  
• $NVDA cross block: $171M (Alert feed)  
• TSLA calls flagged across X

📊 **Vol / Flow**  
• VIX1D 29 < VIX9D 33 > VIX 28.4 < VIX3M 29.45  
• TERMS: flat w/ 9D notch  
• Straddle = 55–60 → 5350–5450 range

📌 **Structure**  
• Support: 4800  
• Resistance: 5500–5600  
• Key: 5360/65, 5400, 5440/50  
• VIX > 50 = possible panic low  
• Breadth off April extremes

📋 **Next Pullback Checklist**  
• ✅ Fewer new lows  
• Slower decline  
• Selling less aggressive  
→ Supports bottom-building

🧩 **SPX 0DTE IF/THEN**

🔸 **Chop Zone: 5365–5425**  
IF > 5400 → 5415  
IF > 5415 → 5400 or 5425  
IF < 5400 → 5385  
IF < 5385 → 5375 → 5360/65

🔺 **Above Chop**  
IF > 5425 → 5440  
IF > 5440 → stall 5450  
IF > 5450 → 5475  
IF > 5475 → 5500

🔻 **Below Chop**  
IF < 5360/65 → 5350  
IF < 5350 → 5320  
IF < 5320 → 5300

💡 **Trade Ideas**  
• PCS < 5365 if rejected  
• CCS > 5440 if stall forms  
• Fade edges → avoid chasing

⚠️ **Additional**  
• Fed + earnings = landmines *or* catapults  
• Russia-Ukraine news risk  
• Watch 9D VIX + TERM steepness

#SPX #OptionsFlow #0DTE #GammaExposure #MarketVolatility #Futures #TSLA #NVDA #VIX #MacroTrading #TechnicalAnalysis #TapeBomb #Breadth #Earnings #TradersToWatch #SPY

---
